calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-04-2022 Vacated

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Dismissing The Action Of Plaintiff Cheryl Foston For Failure To Comply With The Courts Discovery Order And For An Order Imposing Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-03-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Reonna Green, Esq. (877.771.8175; reonna@mylawcompany.com) of M & Y Personal Injury Lawyers for Plaintiff.
No other appearances.

The court notes there was not compliance with tentative ruling rule.

Discussion held re: Ms. Green's pending order to be relieved as counsel. Ms. Green is instructed to follow up with providing the department with a hard of the proposed order on mandatory judicial council form.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS RENTSFNOW, INC., and 57 TAYLOR I7, LP's Motion For An Order Dismissing The Action Of Plaintiff Cheryl Foston For Failure To Comply With The Courts Discovery Order And For An Order Imposing Sanctions:

Defendants 57 Taylor I7, LP and RentSFNow, Inc. unopposed Motion For An Order Dismissing The Action Of Plaintiff Cheryl Foston For Failure To Comply With The Court's Discovery Order And For An Order Imposing Sanctions is GRANTED. Defendants' request for sanctions in the amount of $1712 is GRANTED. The action is hereby dismissed.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Dismissing The Action Of Plaintiff Cheryl Foston For Failure To Comply With The Courts Discovery Order And For An Order Imposing Sanctions

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar May-19-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF CHERYL FOSTON.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Reonna Green's unopposed motion to be relieved as counsel is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Motion To Compel Verified Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production, And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Apr-27-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. REONNA GREEN, Esq. of Movagar & Yamin, PLC (Tel: 877-771-8175) for plaintiff;
Atty. ABRAM P. PETERSEN, Esq. of Lubin Olson & Niewiadomski LLP (Tel: 415-981-0550) for defendants 57 Taylor I7, LP and RentSFNow, Inc.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT RENTSFNOW, INC. and 57 TAYLOR I7, LP's Motion To Compel Verified Responses To Form Interrogatories And Requests For Production, And Production Of Documents.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
